goal: Complete DEV-009 production persistence foundation in the current xtgzpt working tree.

changes: Expanded runtime restart tests to cover chat threads, chat messages, AI drafts, knowledge items, project memory and post-restart knowledge search.
Corrected DEV-009 PostgreSQL migration asset user and organization foreign key types to match existing UUID foundation tables.
Added migration assets for project status history, task status history and denied access events.
Changed smoke:api to use node --import tsx so the managed sandbox does not hit the tsx CLI IPC pipe restriction.
Updated DEV-009, AUDIT-009 and development backlog records.

blocked_by_environment.reason: Current managed worktree has no .git metadata.

next_action: Run online npm audit and git diff --check in the real Git worktree / PR environment, then run GitHub required checks.
